# Lazy Solutions

Lazy Solutions develops professional Unity assets for developers building maintainable game projects.

## Products

### Advanced Scene Manager

Advanced Scene Manager is a Unity scene management tool for organizing, loading, and navigating scenes using scene collections and profiles.

https://lazy.solutions/advanced-scene-manager

### Flow Editor for Advanced Scene Manager

Flow Editor is a visual node-based editor for creating scene loading flows in Advanced Scene Manager.

https://lazy.solutions/showcase/advanced-scene-manager

## Documentation

https://lazy.solutions/docs

## Blog

Technical articles about Unity development, scene management, architecture, and production practices.

https://lazy.solutions/blog

## Company

Lazy Solutions is a Swedish Unity asset developer focused on creating practical tools for professional Unity projects.

https://lazy.solutions/about
